themes: Multi-location reporting friction: Managers across franchise, hospitality, residential, and fitness brands are waiting for improvements to how they view, filter, and act on data across their location portfolios.

Extended wait times eroding trust: The majority of contacts have waited 90 days or more — some nearly a year — signaling a backlog that risks churn and urgently needs prioritization and communication.

Cross-industry, cross-segment breadth: The backlog spans QSR, senior living, property management, fitness, automotive, and travel, suggesting the requested product improvements cut across core platform capabilities rather than a single vertical feature.
